revisions.text: Yes, be the top of all.
revisions.note: Added a period at the end of the sentence for correct punctuation.

revisions.text: But I don't like Scholar at all.
revisions.note: Added a period at the end of the sentence for correct punctuation.

revisions.text: I love beggars.
revisions.note: Changed 'beggar' to 'beggars' for correct grammar (referring to a group/type, not a single person).

revisions.text: You first, I will go after you.
revisions.note: Added a period at the end of the sentence for correct punctuation.

subtitles.text:
Seng-ko-lin-ch'in,
you are really a fool
You bring a thief to harm me
Now, you are titled to be a beggar
You have potential to be beggar
Report duty in the temple tomorrow

If there anyone bullies you,
just tell them my name
So Chan, what do you want as reward?
Don't you have anything to tell me?

revisions.text: You have potential to be a beggar
revisions.note: Added 'a' before 'beggar' for correct grammar.

revisions.text:
If there is anyone bullies you,
just tell them my name
revisions.note: Corrected 'If there anyone' to 'If there is anyone' for correct grammar.

subtitles.text: if you don't respect me, I will kill you

If so, you needn't
squat and talk to me

Don't move, it'll
attract their attention

The number of fellow doesn't
depend on me,

If you are great, making the
society peace and wealthy,
no one wishes to be beggar, right?

revisions.text: we have nothing to chat about
revisions.note: Added 'about' to complete the phrasal verb 'chat about'.

revisions.text: You have billions of fellows.
revisions.note: Added a period at the end of the sentence for consistency with surrounding subtitles.

revisions.text:
The number of fellows doesn't
depend on me,
revisions.note: Corrected singular 'fellow' to plural 'fellows' to agree with 'number of', and changed 'doesn't' to match plural subject.

revisions.text:
If you are great, making the
society peaceful and wealthy,
revisions.note: Corrected 'peace' to the adjective 'peaceful' to match 'wealthy'.

revisions.text: no one wishes to be a beggar, right?
revisions.note: Added article 'a' before 'beggar' for correct grammar.

subtitles.text:
You beg with your girl, you think I'll
give you money out of mercy?
It's bad luck to meet you
Not less than a thousand, got me?
